---
applyTo: "src/**,lib/**,tests/**,*.ts,*.tsx,*.py,*.java,*.go,*.rs,*.cs"
---

# AI-DLC Construction Phase Instructions

When writing or reviewing source code:

- Follow the design artifacts in aidlc-docs/construction/
- Place implementations in src/ and tests/ with matching directory structure
- Run linting and tests before marking a task complete
- Update aidlc-docs/ with deviations from the original design
- Ensure every implementation decision is traceable to a requirement
